---
title: "Option B — ED Timeliness vs Provider Supply and Socioeconomic Context"
author: ""
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
---

## Introduction

## Data Sources

- **CMS Hospital Timeliness Measures**: ED timeliness scores by hospital
- **US Census ACS API**: county-level poverty, income, insurance coverage
- **NPI Registry**: primary care provider density aggregated to county

## Methods

### Data Acquisition

### Geographic Joins (Hospital → County)

## EDA

### Choropleths and Binned Plots

### Provider Density Overlays

## Baseline Modeling

## Limitations

## Conclusion and Final-Project Plan
